prompts: A professional cinematic shot of skullpanda sitting on a futuristic cyberpunk rooftop, neon lights reflecting on its surface, rain falling in the background, high detail, 8k.
A skullpanda sculpture carved out of translucent emerald green jade, intricate traditional Chinese patterns, soft studio lighting, sharp focus, masterpiece.
A cute skullpanda holding a tiny bouquet of dried lavender, walking through a sunlit pine forest, soft bokeh background, warm sunset light.
Extreme close-up portrait of a skullpanda's head, focusing on the texture of its helmet and eyes, soft macro photography, highly detailed, sharp textures.
An oil painting of a skullpanda dressed in an 18th-century royal Victorian outfit, standing in a grand ballroom, Van Gogh style brushstrokes, thick impasto.
A hyper-realistic portrait of an elderly fisherman with a weathered face, gray beard, and deep wrinkles, wearing a yellow raincoat, soft morning light, 8k resolution, highly detailed skin texture.
A breathtaking landscape of the Swiss Alps at sunset, snow-capped peaks, a crystal clear lake reflecting the orange sky, pine trees in the foreground, wide angle shot, cinematic atmosphere.
A vintage 1950s classic red sports car parked on a cobblestone street in Paris, shiny chrome details, Eiffel Tower in the far distance, elegant curves, masterpiece, sharp focus.

A detailed photograph of a giant panda bear sitting comfortably in a classic Halloween background, surrounded by glowing carved pumpkins, cobwebs, and several stylized human skull decorations hanging on the rustic wall behind it.

A surreal, ethereal conceptual art piece: a highly detailed Skullpanda figure carved from moonstone, floating in a cosmic void. It is singing, with flowing, luminous translucent musical notes (made of starlight and liquid silver) gently arcing from its helmet.
